original_description: Attempting to save a large cache entry to localStorage throws QuotaExceededError. The app does not handle storage limits gracefully, causing the save to fail silently and losing user data.

console.message: [Cache] Storage quota exceeded: Failed to execute 'setItem' on 'Storage': Setting the value of 'bugspotter_demo_cache' exceeded the quota.
